canvasPage.title: Projects
canvasPage.subtitle: Create a project, enter the canvas, and keep every image edit linked to its history.
canvasPage.emptyDescription: Start a project to build image edits, branches, and references on one shared canvas.
canvasPage.authDescription: Canvas projects, edit chains, and imported assets are saved to your account.
canvasPage.workspaceError: Failed to load this canvas project.
canvasPage.createProjectFailed: Failed to create a new project.
canvasPage.importEmpty: No assets yet. Generate or upload media first.
canvasPage.leftRailHint: Upload an image or import from your assets to start a chain.
canvasPage.emptyCanvasDescription: Upload a new image or pull one from Assets to place the first node on the canvas.
canvasPage.toolbarHint: Select one or more image nodes to run an edit.
canvasPage.operationFailed: The canvas action could not be started.
canvasPage.uploadFailed: The image could not be uploaded to the canvas.
canvasPage.importFailed: The selected assets could not be imported.
canvasPage.nodeTextDescription: Write prompts, scripts, or structured text
canvasPage.nodeImageDescription: Generate images or use them as references
canvasPage.nodeVideoDescription: Use an image as the main input and generate video
canvasPage.replaceImageFailed: The image could not be updated.
canvasPage.replaceVideoFailed: The video could not be updated.
canvasPage.invalidHttpUrl: Please enter a valid http(s) URL.
canvasPage.addTextInstructionFirst: Add an instruction for how you want to refine this text first.
canvasPage.addPromptOrTextNodeFirst: Add a prompt or connect a Text Node first.
canvasPage.connectPrimaryImageFirst: Connect an Image Node as the primary input first.
canvasPage.missingProviderApiKey: Add the API key for {provider} in the Provider panel first.
canvasPage.videoGeneratedWithOmittedReferences: The video was generated. {count} extra reference images were ignored because they exceed the current model limit.
canvasPage.deleteProjectDescription: Project "{title}" will be permanently removed from the canvas workspace. This action cannot be undone.
canvasPage.textComposerPlaceholder: Describe how you want the model to refine or optimize this text.
canvasPage.imageComposerPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate or refine.
canvasPage.videoComposerPlaceholder: Describe motion, camera, pacing, and scene transitions.
canvasPage.nodeUploadDialogDescription: Choose a local file, or paste a URL to insert media directly into this node.
canvasPage.providerAccessibleImageUrlDescription: {provider} cannot use local image input directly right now.
canvasPage.genericAccessibleImageUrlDescription: The current video model cannot use local image input directly.
canvasPage.accessibleImageUrlBody: Insert a directly accessible http(s) URL into the image node you want to use as video input, then run video generation again. Existing local files will be kept as-is.
canvasPage.deleteGeneratedImagesDescription: The selected images will be removed from this canvas. Keep the checkbox on if you also want them deleted from the database.
canvasPage.deleteGeneratedImageDescription: This image will be removed from this canvas. Keep the checkbox on if you also want it deleted from the database.
canvasPage.noModelsForNodeType: No {kind} models are currently available for this node type.
canvasPage.noTextToCopy: There is no text to copy.
canvasPage.clipboardUnsupported: Clipboard is not supported in this environment.
canvasPage.writeOrRefineText: Write or refine the text here.
canvasPage.noImageToOperate: This node does not have an image to work with yet.
canvasPage.imageCropFailed: Image crop failed. Please try again.
canvasPage.noPlayableVideoForClip: There is no playable video yet. Showing the clip range first.
canvasPage.videoRegeneratePlaceholder: The video regenerate entry point is ready. I can wire the generation flow next.
canvasPage.noFullscreenVideo: This node does not have a video available for fullscreen preview yet.
canvasPage.noDownloadVideo: This node does not have a video available for download yet.
canvasPage.noPlayableVideo: There is no playable video yet.

providerSettings.title: Provider Settings
providerSettings.noPresetModels: There are no preset models for this platform yet. Enter a custom model ID directly.
providerSettings.addPlatformAndModel: Add a platform and a model first
providerSettings.deletePlatformDescription: Deleting {platform} will also remove its models, keys, and custom settings.
providerSettings.deleteModelDescription: Model {model} will be removed from the current platform configuration.
providerSettings.missingPlatformConfigForTest: The current model platform configuration is missing, so the model cannot be tested.
providerSettings.modelTestFailed: Test failed. Check the configuration and try again.
